title: From 0 to 70 Print-Ready Files — One Upload. Here's How.
caption:
This is what happens when you upload to SnapToSize:

1. Upload your PNG or JPG — any resolution, any ratio
2. Resolution check + DPI verified automatically
3. 5 packs generate simultaneously: 2:3, 3:4, 4:5, ISO A-series, Extras
4. Smart ZIP compression — stays under Etsy's 20MB cap
5. Download 70 print-ready files, named and sorted

One upload. Done.

Link in bio -> app.snaptosize.com
